description: Deploys item definitions from a source directory to a workspace. Returns per-item success/failure results and duration.
notes: Status values: 'succeeded' (all OK), 'partial_failure' (some items failed), 'no_changes' (everything already in sync). The 'failures' array contains per-item error details with 'change', 'error', and 'code' fields. Post-hooks fire after successful creates/updates (SemanticModel refresh, Environment publish).

query_examples.description: Get error messages for failed items.
Get total deployment time in milliseconds.
